mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN content_type LIKE 'image/%' THEN 'image' WHEN content_type LIKE 'video/%' THEN 'video' WHEN content_type LIKE 'audio/%' THEN 'audio' WHEN content_type = 'application/pdf' OR content_type LIKE 'application/msword%' OR content_type LIKE 'application/vnd.%' OR content_type LIKE 'text/%' THEN 'doc' ELSE 'other' END AS kind, COUNT(*) AS count, COALESCE(SUM(file_size), 0) AS bytes FROM file_upload_log WHERE app_id = #{appId} GROUP BY kind ORDER BY bytes DESC
